sourcesContent:
import React, { useLayoutEffect, useState } from "react"; import axios from "axios"; import { Table, Pagination, Button, Checkbox } from "semantic-ui-react"; import { useEquipmentHealthRecordHistoryTableHooks } from "./equipment-health-record-history-table-hooks"; import TableContainer from "../../tableContainer"; const EquipmentHealthRecordHistoryTable = () => { const equipmentInfo = useEquipmentHealthRecordHistoryTableHooks(); return (
ID Serial Asset Number Failure Resolution Result and Action Taken Task Number Work Order Number HA Work Request Before CM Video After CM Video Creation Date Record Completed? Completion Date Completion Time {equipmentInfo.map((part) => ( {part.id} {part.serial} {part.assetNumber} {part.failure} {part.resolution} {part.result} {part.taskNumber} {part.workOrder} {part.haWorkRequest} {part.oldFilename} {part.newFilename} {part.dateCreated} {part.completed} {part.completionDate} {part.completionTime} ))}
); }; export default EquipmentHealthRecordHistoryTable;
